description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a mix of hardscaped and landscaped areas. The structure features clean, white exterior walls and flat roofs, with large windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a central courtyard. The courtyard is lushly planted with palm trees, shrubs, and other greenery, creating a private outdoor living space. The building is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, some of which are slightly offset to create visual interest and functional zones. The surrounding grounds are sparsely vegetated with desert-style plants and a mix of paved and natural surfaces. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, and a central landscaped courtyard surrounded by desert-style vegetation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central courtyard, and prominent palm trees with a clear view of the building's white facade.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the courtyard's lush greenery and the offset arrangement of the building's volumes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and a more private section of the bungalow with less visible landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entrance, more vegetation, and the connection between different building sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors facing the courtyard
